25.reason: [When popping, it should print b[flag] (after decrementing flag) or b[j-1], but here it prints b[flag+1] which is incorrect indexing. Also, 'j' is not properly synchronized with 'flag'.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [When popping, it should print b[flag] (after decrementing flag) or b[j-1], but here it prints b[flag+1] which is incorrect indexing. Also, 'j' is not properly synchronized with 'flag'.]

26.reason: [This assignment corrupts the stack pointer 'j'; 'j' should represent the next available index in b, but it's being overwritten based on 'flag', leading to inconsistent state.]
